test_cases.name: Single Node Failure
test_cases.description: Verify file reconstruction when 1 of 3 nodes fails
test_cases.expected_outcome: SUCCESS - File reconstructable from any 2 of 3 fragments

test_cases.name: Dual Node Failure
test_cases.description: Verify system correctly fails when 2 of 3 nodes fail

test_cases.name: Deduplication Check
test_cases.description: Verify second upload of same content is deduplicated
test_cases.expected_outcome: SUCCESS - Second file upload instant, no new fragments created
